text: Synthetic demo statement: before using GB 7258 in an answer, confirm the source status, publication date, implementation date, and replacement relationship from the official metadata record.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 7258 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: vehicle operation safety checks should keep the vehicle identity, use context, inspection date, and checked safety systems together in one traceable record.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 7258 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: a safety review should preserve separate findings for braking, steering, lighting/signalling, tires, body condition, and other relevant systems instead of merging them into one untraceable note.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 7258 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: if a vehicle has a special configuration or modification, the answer packet should mark applicability as requiring review until the authorized source text and vehicle configuration are checked.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 7258 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: compliance workflow records should connect each safety finding to evidence, reviewer notes, and unresolved issues so later answers can distinguish checked facts from assumptions.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 7258 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: answers based on GB 7258 metadata or synthetic provisions must say they are demo-only and cannot be treated as authoritative GB 7258 compliance conclusions.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 7258 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: before using GB 1589 in an answer, confirm the source status, publication date, implementation date, and replacement relationship from the official metadata record.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 1589 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: dimension, axle-load, and mass questions require the vehicle category, trailer or combination status, measurement values, units, and measurement context before an answer can be evaluated.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 1589 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: a limit-check workflow should keep raw measured values, units, configuration notes, and the comparator rule separate so auditors can reproduce the conclusion.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 1589 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: if the vehicle type, trailer arrangement, or special-use status is unknown, the answer packet should mark dimensional applicability as unresolved rather than returning a pass/fail result.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 1589 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: comparison answers should state the applicable document version, the measured attribute, the candidate limit source, and any unresolved evidence before making a workflow recommendation.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 1589 clause.

text: Synthetic demo statement: answers based on GB 1589 metadata or synthetic provisions must say they are demo-only and cannot be treated as authoritative GB 1589 limit or compliance conclusions.
extraction_notes: Synthetic/paraphrased workflow provision. Not a GB 1589 clause.
